requirements.requirement: User can POST to /auth/login with email and password and receive a JWT token
requirements.evidence: src/auth/login.py line 6 — jwt.encode() called with user.id and 24h expiry

requirements.requirement: Invalid credentials must return HTTP 401 with an error message
requirements.evidence: src/auth/login.py line 4 — HTTPException(status_code=401) raised on bcrypt mismatch

requirements.requirement: Protected routes must reject requests without a valid JWT token
requirements.evidence: src/auth/middleware.py line 3-4 — Missing token raises HTTP 401
src/auth/login.py line 5 — timedelta(hours=24) passed to jwt.encode()

requirements.requirement: Passwords must be hashed using bcrypt before storage
requirements.evidence: src/models/user.py stores password_hash column, bcrypt.checkpw() used in login — but no evidence of hashing on registration in this PR

test_results.result: FAILED — register endpoint not in PR scope
